merge_notes: This local catalog is intentionally shaped like public.items_catalog rows: item_key, item_name, item_type, item_rarity, price_gp, merchant_tags, payload.
Later DB merge can upsert into public.items_catalog by item_key. Add a unique index on item_key first if you want true upserts.
The stable machine-readable contract is payload.alchemy. Keep that object shape when migrating merchant stock and loot tables.
